title: API discovery manifest
description: Body returned by GET /api — the service's self-description of its HTTP surface and any optional streaming channels. Lets a client (or curl) discover every operation with no frontend.

version.description: Service version (semver or git short SHA).

endpoints.description: Every synchronous HTTP operation the service exposes. Per the curl-able rule, every operation appears here.

streaming.description: Optional real-time channels layered on top of the HTTP surface (Socket.IO / SSE / WebSocket / WebRTC). Informational; never the only way to reach a result.

channel.description: SSE channel / stream name, where applicable.

path.description: Connection path, where applicable (e.g. the SSE or WS endpoint).
